text.text:
*Current Issue*
Credible reports indicate Microsoft 365 Admin Center access issues affecting admins in North America, with intermittent 'service unavailable' behavior and degraded portal usability across multiple tenants.

fields.text:
*Status*
Investigating / degradation reported; broad admin-center impact appears credible but scope and recovery are not yet clearly confirmed.

*Impact*
MSP admin workflows may be delayed for tenant management, user changes, and support actions that depend on the Microsoft 365 admin portal.

text.text:
*Response*
• Avoid non-urgent tenant changes and use alternate admin paths or retry later if portal actions fail.
• Notify service desk and account teams that Microsoft 365 admin operations may be delayed; monitor Microsoft status updates before escalating widely.

elements.text: <https://www.neowin.net/news/microsoft-confirms-outage-as-some-microsoft-365-services-go-down/|Neowin summary quoting Microsoft 365 Status> • <https://community.spiceworks.com/t/m365-admin-center-is-having-issues-this-afternoon/1251842|Spiceworks community confirmation>
